Made in the USA

We fully own and operate our facility in Allentown, Pennsylvania

Dog Obsessed, Obsessively Made

Spot & Tango started in a tiny NYC kitchen in 2017, when our founder Russell cooked fresh meals for his dog, Jack. What began as one bowl has grown into over 130 million meals served — and today we proudly craft UnKibble in our own state-of-the-art facility in Allentown, Pennsylvania.

Our mission hasn’t changed: wholesome food for dogs, made simple for their humans.

See Plans & Pricing

UnKibble is a first-of-its-kind FreshDry™ dog food made with real, human-grade ingredients that are gently cooked and dried at low temperatures to preserve taste, aroma, and nutrition. Unlike traditional kibble—which relies on high-heat processing and lower-quality ingredients—UnKibble uses whole foods and a low-temperature method that keeps nutrients intact. The result: better digestibility, a more delicious flavor, and the everyday ease of scoop-and-serve.

Many dogs show improvements in digestion, energy, and appetite within the first few weeks. In a customer survey, 87% noticed health benefits at 30 days. Even if you don’t see immediate changes, feeding high-quality, minimally processed whole foods supports foundational health that builds over time.

If your dog doesn’t enjoy the food, you’re covered by our 14-Day Happy Pup Guarantee. Just reach out to our Customer Experience Team via phone, text, or email to start a refund. Our real-human support team is available seven days a week to answer questions, help with transitions, or guide you to the right plan.

* Spot & Tango customer survey, conducted March 2024 (n=195)

† Digestibility study conducted Q4, 2024 at 3rd-party research lab

‡ Lippert and Sapy, “Relation Between the Domestic Dogs’ Well-Being and Life Expectancy” Statistical Essay
